subtasks.label: Research Supabase setup (free tier, region, API keys, Next.js client)
Design PostgreSQL schema for scholars, countries, specializations with indexes
Create Supabase project, configure RLS, public read-only policies
Write seed script: migrate 26 scholars + 10 countries + 11 specializations from TS
Create src/lib/db.ts with getScholars(), getCountries(), getSpecializations() using Supabase client
Refactor page.tsx: replace static imports with async DB fetch, add revalidate for ISR
Add loading.tsx with skeleton UI during data fetch
Remove static data files: src/data/scholars/*, barrel file; keep types/index.ts
Add /api/scholars CRUD scaffold for future admin content management
Test filtering end-to-end, update data-organization.md and 01-build-from-scratch.md
Audit all docs/ files for accuracy against current codebase

Completed task "Standardize naming convention to kebab-case": All 18 doc files renamed to kebab-case. README.md links updated to match new filenames. Remaining 3 files (command-center-blueprint-textual, command-center-blueprint-voices-of-truth, README) already kebab-case or standard.
Started task "Archive/label speculative blueprints"

Completed task "Archive/label speculative blueprints": 3 blueprint files moved to docs/archive/: command-center-blueprint-textual, command-center-blueprint-voices-of-truth, setup-command-center. README.md links updated to point to archive/ paths with (Archived) label suffix.
Started task "Add cross-references between related docs"

Completed task "Add cross-references between related docs": Added See also cross-reference sections to 6 documents: 01-build-from-scratch (links to styling, layout, translation, prop-drilling), 12-layout-system (links to styling), prop-drilling-deep-dive (links to component-refactoring), 17-component-refactoring-suggestions (links to prop-drilling), theme-analysis (links to styling, hydration-fix), improvement-plan (links to styling, component-refactoring, prop-drilling, build-from-scratch).
Started task "Write missing docs for coverage gaps"

Completed task "Write missing docs for coverage gaps": Wrote 2 gap docs: data-organization.md (scholar data model, file layout, barrel pattern, categoryId mapping) and component-catalog.md (all 18 components cataloged with hierarchy diagram). Updated README.md to include both.
Approved task "Add status badges to all docs".
Approved task "Standardize naming convention to kebab-case".
Approved task "Archive/label speculative blueprints".
Approved task "Add cross-references between related docs".
Approved task "Write missing docs for coverage gaps".
Created milestone "Supabase Data Migration" in backlog
Added task "Research Supabase setup (free tier, region, API keys, Next.js client)" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Design PostgreSQL schema for scholars, countries, specializations with indexes" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Create Supabase project, configure RLS, public read-only policies" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Write seed script: migrate 26 scholars + 10 countries + 11 specializations from TS" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Create src/lib/db.ts with getScholars(), getCountries(), getSpecializations() using Supabase client" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Refactor page.tsx: replace static imports with async DB fetch, add revalidate for ISR" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Add loading.tsx with skeleton UI during data fetch" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Remove static data files: src/data/scholars/*, barrel file; keep types/index.ts" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Add /api/scholars CRUD scaffold for future admin content management" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Added task "Test filtering end-to-end, update data-organization.md and 01-build-from-scratch.md" to milestone "Supabase Data Migration"
Activated milestone "Supabase Data Migration" — moved from backlog to active
Started task "Verify ThemeProvider and full-page theme coverage"

Completed task "Verify ThemeProvider and full-page theme coverage": Completed theme token unification across all components. Updated Header, Footer, FilterBar, FilterDropdown, SearchInput, and ScholarAvatar to use CSS variable theme tokens (bg-background, bg-card, text-foreground, etc.). Verified ThemeProvider covers all page surfaces and theme switching works without hydration errors. pnpm lint and pnpm build passed successfully.
Started task "Recheck root and locale layout ownership for lang and dir"

Completed task "Recheck root and locale layout ownership for lang and dir": Fixed root layout locale params issue. Root layout now properly handles locale parameters with fallback to 'en' when undefined. Updated interface to correctly handle Promise<{locale?: string}> and async/await pattern. Verified build and lint pass successfully. English pages render with LTR direction and Arabic pages render with RTL direction. No hydration errors or console warnings.
Started task "Make filter controls reflect current URL state"

Completed task "Make filter controls reflect current URL state": Filter controls now reflect current URL state. Added currentFilters to FilterContext with query/country/lang/category values from URL searchParams. Updated SearchInput to use currentFilters.query as value. Updated FilterDropdown to accept value prop. Updated CountryFilter, LanguageFilter, and CategoryFilter to pass URL values to FilterDropdown.
Started task "Replace noisy search navigation with safer URL updates"

Completed task "Replace noisy search navigation with safer URL updates": Changed router.push to router.replace for filter URL updates to prevent excessive browser history entries. Search changes now update URL and server-filtered results without polluting browser history. Country, language, and category filters keep their existing shareable URL behavior.
Started task "Add guardrails for invalid filter query params"

Completed task "Add guardrails for invalid filter query params": Added guardrails for invalid filter query params. Precomputed validCountryIds and validCategoryIds sets. Invalid country/category/lang values now act as if the filter was absent (showing all results) instead of producing confusing empty results. Build passes successfully.
Started task "Clean tutorial comments and obvious naming or formatting issues"

Completed task "Clean tutorial comments and obvious naming or formatting issues": Cleaned tutorial-style comments from FilterBar.tsx, FilterContext.tsx, HomePageClient.tsx, and LanguageSwitcher.tsx. Removed explanatory/narrative comments that only narrate code (numbered comments, JSX comments about map/render, etc.). Build and lint passed.
Started task "Fix root layout locale params (lang/dir undefined)"

Completed task "Fix root layout locale params (lang/dir undefined)": Root layout locale param fix already applied during ms1_003. Root layout uses params: Promise<{locale?: string}> with 'en' fallback. lang and dir attributes set correctly. suppressHydrationWarning added for hydration safety.
Started task "Fix SearchInput translation key mismatch"

Completed task "Fix SearchInput translation key mismatch": Fixed SearchInput translation key mismatch: changed t('searchByName') to t('searchPlaceholder') to match the actual key defined in en/common.json and ar/common.json locale files. Build passed.
Started task "Fix Arabic text corrupted by Latin chars in comparative-religion.ts"

Completed task "Fix Arabic text corrupted by Latin chars in comparative-religion.ts": Fixed corrupted Arabic text in comparative-religion.ts: Line 100: الباطل instead of البaطل (Latin 'a' removed from Arabic word). Line 116: بَيْنَنَا instead of bَيْنَنَا (Latin 'b' removed from Arabic word). Build passed.
Started task "Fix LanguageSwicher import typo in Header"

Completed task "Fix LanguageSwicher import typo in Header": Fixed LanguageSwicher import typo in Header.tsx: corrected import alias and JSX element from LanguageSwicher to LanguageSwitcher. Build passed.
Started task "Fix double semicolon in scholars.ts"
Started task "Fix next-env.d.ts permissions (777 → 644)"
Started task "Fix txs → text-xs in ScholarInfo"
Started task "Remove unused specializations prop from HomePageClient"
Started task "FilterDropdown: use value-only key instead of index"
Completed task "Fix double semicolon in scholars.ts": Fixed double semicolon in scholars.ts line 26: '];;' → '];'. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Fix next-env.d.ts permissions (777 → 644)": Attempted to fix next-env.d.ts permissions from 777 to 644. File is owned by root and chmod requires interactive sudo. Noted as blocked by file ownership. No functional impact.
Completed task "Fix txs → text-xs in ScholarInfo": Fixed 'txs' to 'text-xs' in ScholarInfo.tsx line 18. Invalid Tailwind class 'txs' replaced with valid 'text-xs'. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Remove unused specializations prop from HomePageClient": Removed unused specializations prop from HomePageClient: removed from interface, import, and destructuring. Also removed from page.tsx JSX. Build and lint passed.
Completed task "FilterDropdown: use value-only key instead of index": Changed FilterDropdown option keys from  to just . Value is sufficient as key and cleaner. Build and lint passed.
Started task "Fix ScholarAvatar onError fallback path (relative → absolute)"
Started task "Localize category labels in filter (use s.ar when locale is ar)"
Started task "Localize country names in filter (use c.ar when locale is ar)"
Started task "Fix focus:right-2 → focus:ring-2 in SearchInput"
Started task "Add empty state component for zero filter results"
Started task "Move null-check before hook access in ScholarCard"
Started task "Add alt text for default avatar fallback"
Started task "Replace hardcoded gray colors with CSS variable theme tokens in FilterBar"
Started task "Wrap useSearchParams in Suspense boundary in HomePageClient"

Completed task "Fix ScholarAvatar onError fallback path (relative → absolute)": Fixed ScholarAvatar onError fallback: replaced relative paths ('../../public/avatars/...') with absolute path ('/avatars/default-avatar.png'). Implemented state-based fallback using useState instead of unreliable onError DOM mutation. Removed unoptimized prop. Build passed.

Completed task "Localize category labels in filter (use s.ar when locale is ar)": Localized category labels in filter: page.tsx now uses locale param to select s.ar when locale is 'ar' and s.en otherwise. Added locale destructuring from params. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Localize country names in filter (use c.ar when locale is ar)": Localized country names in filter: page.tsx now uses locale param to select c.ar when locale is 'ar' and c.en otherwise. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Fix focus:right-2 → focus:ring-2 in SearchInput": Focus ring was already fixed during theme token migration (ms1_002). SearchInput already uses focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring instead of focus:right-2. Verified current state.

Completed task "Add empty state component for zero filter results": Added empty state component to ScholarList. When scholars array is empty (no results match filters), displays a user-friendly message using existing 'noScholarsFound' translation key from scholar.json locale files. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Move null-check before hook access in ScholarCard": Added null/undefined check on scholar.name in ScholarList before ScholarCard rendering (which calls useLocalizedScholar hook). Moved guard from ScholarCard to ScholarList to prevent hook access with null scholar.name. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Add alt text for default avatar fallback": Refactored ScholarAvatar with proper state-based fallback (useState for imgError). Alt text shows 'Default avatar' on fallback, original name on success. Removed unreliable onError DOM mutation and unoptimized prop. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Replace hardcoded gray colors with CSS variable theme tokens in FilterBar": FilterBar already uses bg-card theme token (replaced during ms1_002 theme unification). No further changes needed.

Completed task "Document server-compatible components (ScholarInfo, FilterDropdown)": Documented server-compatible components (ScholarInfo, FilterDropdown). These components have no 'use client' directive, no hooks, no event handlers but are used within client components. No code changes needed.

Completed task "Wrap useSearchParams in Suspense boundary in HomePageClient": Wrapped HomePageClient in Suspense boundary in page.tsx as required by Next.js 15 for useSearchParams(). Added fallback loading indicator. Build and lint passed.
Started task "Add 9 missing social media icons to SocialMediaLinks"
Started task "Add missing i18n keys for 3 specializations (islamicHistory, islamicJurisprudence, islamicThought)"
Started task "Translate hardcoded languages: string in ScholarInfo"
Started task "Replace RTL-incompatible space-x-* with gap-* in Header, LanguageSwitcher, SocialMediaLinks"
Started task "Localize static metadata with generateMetadata using appTitle key"
Started task "Extend search to include scholar bios for better discoverability"
Started task "Restructure ThemeProvider nesting outside I18nProviderClient to prevent remount"

Completed task "Add 9 missing social media icons to SocialMediaLinks": Added 9 missing social media icons to SocialMediaLinks: FaTiktok, FaGlobe, SiPatreon, FaPaypal, FaApple, FaSoundcloud, FaAndroid, FaLinkedin, FaWhatsapp. Restructured IconContext.Provider to wrap entire container instead of per-icon. Replaced mx-2 with gap-2 on parent container. Build passed.

Completed task "Add missing i18n keys for 3 specializations (islamicHistory, islamicJurisprudence, islamicThought)": Added missing i18n keys for islamicHistory, islamicJurisprudence, islamicThought in both en/scholar.json and ar/scholar.json locale files. Also added 'languages' translation key. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Translate hardcoded languages: string in ScholarInfo": Translated hardcoded 'languages:' string in ScholarInfo. Added languagesLabel prop to ScholarInfo. ScholarCard now passes t('languages') from scholar namespace as prop. Added 'languages' translation key to both locale files. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Replace RTL-incompatible space-x-* with gap-* in Header, LanguageSwitcher, SocialMediaLinks": Replaced RTL-incompatible space-x-* with gap-* in Header (space-x-2/sm:space-x-4 → gap-2/sm:gap-4), LanguageSwitcher (space-x-1 → gap-1), and SocialMediaLinks (mx-2 replaced by gap-2 on container). Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Localize static metadata with generateMetadata using appTitle key": Added generateMetadata to locale layout using appTitle translation key. Gets locale from params and calls getTranslation with 'common' namespace for localized title. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Extend search to include scholar bios for better discoverability": Extended search to include scholar bios in page.tsx filter. Search now checks bio.en and bio.ar in addition to name.en and name.ar for better discoverability. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Restructure ThemeProvider nesting outside I18nProviderClient to prevent remount": Restructured ThemeProvider nesting outside I18nProviderClient in locale layout to prevent theme state loss on i18n re-renders. ThemeProvider now wraps I18nProviderClient instead of being nested inside it. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Fix unreliable next/image onError and unoptimized prop in ScholarAvatar": ScholarAvatar fallback already fixed in ms1_026: replaced unreliable onError DOM mutation with state-based fallback using useState. Removed unoptimized prop. No further changes needed.

Completed task "Tighten loose index signatures in Country and Specialization types": Tightened loose index signatures [key: string]: string | number in Country and Specialization types. Removed index signatures entirely. Updated ScholarList to use keyof typeof cast for dynamic property access. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Remove unnecessary as Scholar[] type assertion in page.tsx": Removed unnecessary 'as Scholar[]' type assertion from page.tsx. filteredScholars is already correctly typed from the filter on Scholar[]. Removed unused Scholar import. Build and lint passed.
Started task "Move IconContext.Provider outside per-icon loop in SocialMediaLinks"
Started task "Fix fragile relative import path in i18n.ts"
Started task "Remove commented locale param destructuring in page.tsx"
Started task "Wire unused appTitle translation key into the page title"
Started task "Fix fragile locale replace logic in LanguageSwitcher"

Completed task "Move IconContext.Provider outside per-icon loop in SocialMediaLinks": IconContext.Provider was already restructured during ms1_012 changes: now wraps the entire icon container (line 51-55) instead of being inside each icon's render function. No further changes needed.

Completed task "Fix fragile relative import path in i18n.ts": Fixed fragile relative import path in i18n.ts: changed '../../public/locales/' to '@/../public/locales/' which uses the path alias and is robust to file relocation. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Remove commented-out code in ScholarInfo": Removed commented-out old implementation in ScholarInfo (lines 10-12: the alternate function signature using React.FC). No functional changes. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Remove commented locale param destructuring in page.tsx": The commented-out locale param destructuring was already removed during ms1_014 changes when locale was activated for filter localization. Line is now active code. No further changes needed.

Completed task "Wire unused appTitle translation key into the page title": appTitle translation key was already wired during ms1_033. Locale layout now uses generateMetadata with t('appTitle') from getTranslation for localized page titles. No further changes needed.

Completed task "Fix fragile locale replace logic in LanguageSwitcher": Fixed fragile locale replace logic in LanguageSwitcher: replaced pathname.replace() which only replaces first occurrence with a safer path segment approach that splits on '/' and replaces the first segment. Prevents locale string corruption if it appears elsewhere in URL. Build and lint passed.
Started task "Add remotePatterns config in next.config.ts for future image support"

Completed task "Add remotePatterns config in next.config.ts for future image support": Added remotePatterns config in next.config.ts with wildcard https hostname pattern for future image support. Build passed.

Completed task "Gate console.error behind NODE_ENV check in ScholarCard": Gated console.error behind process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' check in ScholarCard to prevent exposing scholar data in production browser console. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Add mobile background image variant or remove md-only restriction": Removed md: breakpoint prefix from background image classes in root layout. Background image now shows on all screen sizes including mobile. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Fix inconsistent responsive text sizing in ScholarInfo": Fixed inconsistent responsive text sizing in ScholarInfo: changed country from 'text-xs sm:text-xl' to 'text-sm sm:text-base' for smoother size transition. Standardized bio text. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Add visible ring/border class to ScholarAvatar": Added visible border to ScholarAvatar by changing 'border-border' to 'border-2 border-border' for a visible ring matching app theme. Build and lint passed.

Completed task "Standardize margin spacing in ScholarInfo children": Standardized margin spacing in ScholarInfo: changed name mb-1 to mb-2, languages mb-3 to mb-2 for consistent vertical spacing across all children. Build and lint passed.
